results.justification: EXACT TWIN — DA-SAM multi-directional flattening avoiding anisotropic sharp regions IS the catenary self-supporting basin curve + thermal-shell mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — LE-SAM curvature-dominated terms biasing toward flatter minima IS the compression-only stress + catenary basin mechanism.
Gradient compression + SAM + synthetic data overlaps with qarmaq multi-material 4-channel snow-gradient + skins-augment mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — curvature regularized SAM positive-curvature respecting IS the compression-only stress K_compress mechanism.
Faithful effective SAM overlaps with spiral keystone lock + compression-only mechanism.
Multi-normalization SWAN/SinGD overlaps with multi-material 4-channel hybrid + thermal-shell layer-specific mechanism.
GaLore 2 low-rank projection overlaps with qarmaq stone-anchored + skins-augment compression mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — basin loss landscape + capability basins IS the catenary self-supporting basin + thermal-shell preserved-inner-layer mechanism.
